issue.title: rainbowplantlife.com

labels.name: T: Incorrect Blocking
labels.description: Website or app not working properly due to filtering

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [https://rainbowplantlife.com/](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Frainbowplantlife.com%2F) ### Comment > Multiple websites are blocking access in Safari on iOS 26.5 when AdGuard is enabled. Provided is a screenshot of one such example from the website rainbowplantlife.com ### Screenshots
Screenshot 1 ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/ix7xpq7723cc0ssg80scw0o8gc84c4sjd2awf7zw6g.jpg?nc=1)
Screenshot 1 with AdGuard disabled ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/1mt2s90my7ogcwook0o04w44s0skkccl6vzg7sb1tw.jpg?nc=1)
### System configuration | Information | Value | |-------------|-------| AdGuard product: | AdGuard for iOS v4.5.20 System version: | `iOS 26.5` License type: | paid Advanced protection: | enabled Filters: | **Ad Blocking:**
AdGuard Base filter,
AdGuard Mobile Ads filter,
EasyList

**Privacy:**
AdGuard Tracking Protection filter,
EasyPrivacy,
Peter Lowe's Blocklist

**Annoyances:**
AdGuard Annoyances filter,
AdGuard Popups filter,
AdGuard Mobile App Banners filter,
AdGuard Other Annoyances filter,
Adblock Warning Removal List

**Security:**
Phishing URL Blocklist,
Scam Blocklist by DurableNapkin,
uBlock Origin – Badware risks

**Other:**

**Language-specific:**
Dandelion Sprout's Nordic Filters DNS filtering: | disabled
